title: Station 1 – Ex 5: How Can You Help? (Ratschläge geben)
description: Ratschläge geben mit should, could, why don't you. Mehrere Antworten werden akzeptiert – trenne Varianten mit Komma (z.B. 'should, could').

items.question: Mr Elliot doesn't understand the instructions. He ___ look for help online. (Ratschlag)
Granny Rose can't find her friends' numbers. She ___ join a social network. (Ratschlag)
Claire doesn't understand her camera. Why ___ she read the instructions? (Vorschlag)
Ratschlag geben (positiv): You ___... (Modalverb)
Vorschlag: Why ___ you...?
Rat verneint: You ___ do that. (solltest nicht)
instructions → Deutsch
awful → Deutsch
I don't understand ___ word! (keinen einzigen)
I can't find them any ___. (nicht mehr)
Mr Elliot has a problem ___ the instructions. (Präposition)
You ___ find a tutorial on YouTube. (könntest)
She ___ ask someone for help. (sollte)
Why don't you ___ someone for help? (fragen)
Kamera → camera. Claire doesn't know how to ___ it. (benutzen)
Rat geben → to give ___
You could ___ for the information online. (suchen)
He ___ watch a video tutorial. (könnte)
If you ___ understand, ask someone. (nicht kannst)
Where are my ___ numbers? (Telefonnummern)
